author: y4rr
content: Result: ConvNeXt-Tiny V.1 forward parity conformance lane delivered in Sprint B.5.b / V.1. 5 conformance tests in conformance_vision_models.rs (output_shape, output_finite, param_count_in_range, custom_num_classes, deterministic_forward).
